root_text.an3.136:1.1: “Uppādā vā, bhikkhave, tathāgatānaṁ anuppādā vā tathāgatānaṁ, ṭhitāva sā dhātu dhammaṭṭhitatā dhammaniyāmatā.
root_text.an3.136:1.4: Abhisambujjhitvā abhisametvā ācikkhati deseti paññāpeti paṭṭhapeti vivarati vibhajati uttānīkaroti:
root_text.an3.136:1.6: Uppādā vā, bhikkhave, tathāgatānaṁ anuppādā vā tathāgatānaṁ ṭhitāva sā dhātu dhammaṭṭhitatā dhammaniyāmatā.
root_text.an3.136:1.9: Abhisambujjhitvā abhisametvā ācikkhati deseti paññāpeti paṭṭhapeti vivarati vibhajati uttānīkaroti:
root_text.an3.136:1.11: Uppādā vā, bhikkhave, tathāgatānaṁ anuppādā vā tathāgatānaṁ ṭhitāva sā dhātu dhammaṭṭhitatā dhammaniyāmatā.
root_text.an3.136:1.14: Abhisambujjhitvā abhisametvā ācikkhati deseti paññāpeti paṭṭhapeti vivarati vibhajati uttānīkaroti:

translation_text.an3.136:1.1: “Mendicants, whether Realized Ones arise or not, this law of nature persists, this regularity of natural principles, this surety of natural principles:
translation_text.an3.136:1.3: A Realized One awakens to this and comprehends it,
translation_text.an3.136:1.4: then he explains, teaches, asserts, establishes, clarifies, analyzes, and reveals it:
translation_text.an3.136:1.6: Whether Realized Ones arise or not, this law of nature persists, this regularity of natural principles, this surety of natural principles:
translation_text.an3.136:1.8: A Realized One awakens to this and comprehends it,
translation_text.an3.136:1.9: then he explains, teaches, asserts, establishes, clarifies, analyzes, and reveals it:
translation_text.an3.136:1.11: Whether Realized Ones arise or not, this law of nature persists, this regularity of natural principles, this surety of natural principles:
translation_text.an3.136:1.13: A Realized One awakens to this and comprehends it,
translation_text.an3.136:1.14: then he explains, teaches, asserts, establishes, clarifies, analyzes, and reveals it:
